bird.name: 非洲金織雀
bird.summary: 非洲金織雀 (Ploceus xanthops), 又名非洲織雀、東非織巢鳥。是織布文鳥科的一種鳥類。 其英文俗名（Holub's golden weaver）是為了紀念捷克博物學家埃米爾·霍盧布。

relations.subject: 非洲金織雀
relations.evidence: They live in areas that are inland from freshwater which includes forests, savannas, shrublands, grasslands, and wetlands. They cover a range of different habitats which includes bushy areas with tall grass
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
